scripts.build:chrome: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && vite build --config vite.page.config.ts && vite build --config vite.bbcdn.config.ts && vite build --config vite.ytoriginalaudio.config.ts && vite build --config vite.ytcdnstatus.config.ts && vite build --config vite.douyinplayback.config.ts && node scripts/cleanup-package-dir.mjs dist
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/build-firefox-dist.mjs prepare && vite build --config vite.content.firefox.config.ts && vite build --config vite.firefox.feature-modules.config.ts && node scripts/build-firefox-dist.mjs finalize
scripts.validate:chrome-package: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=512 npm run build:chrome && npm run verify:chrome-package
scripts.validate:firefox-low-memory: npm run cleanup:firefox-probe && npm run check && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=512 npm run build:firefox && npm run verify:firefox-package && npm run verify:firefox-coverage
scripts.prepare:firefox-release: npm run validate:firefox-low-memory && npm run package:firefox-xpi && npm run package:firefox-source
